{{Quote|Verkuyl will never attract the tourist trade, that's for sure.|Daven Quarle, on Verkuyl's smell|<ref name="J13" />}}
'''Verkuyl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Verkuyl system/Legends|Verkuyl system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] was grown.

==History==
The planet was bought by [[Corlin Quarle Deld]], founder of [[Verkuylian BactaCo]], the employees of which signed ten-year labor contracts. The company headquarters was on [[Dalos Peninsula]]. The company was [[Imperialization/Legends|nationalized]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Parco Ein]] with the help of Corlin's grandson, [[Daven Quarle]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[GalFactorial]] bid to build a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] refinery on the planet. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] liberated the world despite the earlier betrayal of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] agents [[Claris]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Cobb Vartos]], and [[Selby Jarrad]] by Daven.
